message:
fix(gui): add graceful shutdown and RAII cleanup to native event bridge

Store JoinHandle, Arc<Mux>, and subscription_id in NativeEventBridge.
Drop impl joins the sender thread and unsubscribes from the original
mux instance. Replace thread::sleep(backoff) with polling loop that
checks shutdown flag every 50ms for fast shutdown response. Handle
spawn failure gracefully. Add 3 tests for shutdown wait, drop cleanup,
and mux swap correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
